24.reason: [Using bitwise NOT (~) on fscanf return value is incorrect; fscanf returns EOF (-1) on failure, and ~(-1) is 0, causing loop to exit prematurely or behave unexpectedly. Should use while (fscanf(...) == 1)]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Using bitwise NOT (~) on fscanf return value is incorrect; fscanf returns EOF (-1) on failure, and ~(-1) is 0, causing loop to exit prematurely or behave unexpectedly. Should use while (fscanf(...) == 1)]
